logical_pins.name: VCCINT
logical_pins.description: Internal supply voltage. Typical values: 0.720V, 0.850V, or 0.900V depending on speed grade and device type.

logical_pins.name: VCCINT_IO
logical_pins.description: Internal supply voltage for the I/O banks. Must be connected to VCCBRAM. Typical values: 0.720V, 0.850V, or 0.900V.

logical_pins.name: VCCAUX
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary supply voltage. Typical value: 1.800V (1.746V - 1.854V).

logical_pins.name: VCCBRAM
logical_pins.description: Supply voltage for the block RAM and UltraRAM. Typical values: 0.850V or 0.900V.

logical_pins.name: VCCO
logical_pins.description: Output drivers supply voltage. 1.140V - 3.400V for HD I/O banks, 0.950V - 1.900V for HP I/O banks and configuration bank 0.

logical_pins.name: VCCAUX_IO
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary supply voltage for the I/O banks. Must be connected to VCCAUX. Typical value: 1.800V (1.746V - 1.854V).

logical_pins.name: VBATT
logical_pins.description: Key memory battery backup supply. Range: 1.000V - 1.890V.

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVCC
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for transceiver circuits. Typical value: 0.900V (0.873V - 0.927V).

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVTT
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for transceiver termination circuits. Typical value: 1.200V (1.164V - 1.236V).

logical_pins.name: VMGTVCCAUX
logical_pins.description: Auxiliary analog QPLL voltage supply for transceivers. Typical value: 1.800V (1.746V - 1.854V).

logical_pins.name: VMGTAVTTRCAL
logical_pins.description: Analog supply voltage for the resistor calibration circuit of the transceiver column. Typical value: 1.200V (1.164V - 1.236V).

logical_pins.name: VCCADC
logical_pins.description: System Monitor supply relative to GNDADC. Typical value: 1.800V (1.746V - 1.854V).

logical_pins.name: VREF
logical_pins.description: Input reference voltage for HP I/O banks.

logical_pins.name: TCK
logical_pins.description: JTAG test clock pin.

logical_pins.name: A[28:00]
logical_pins.description: BPI master flash mode address bus.

logical_pins.name: RS[1:0]
logical_pins.description: BPI master flash mode revision select pins.

logical_pins.name: FCS_B
logical_pins.description: Flash chip select pin for BPI and SPI modes.

logical_pins.name: FOE_B
logical_pins.description: BPI master flash mode output enable pin.

logical_pins.name: FWE_B
logical_pins.description: BPI master flash mode write enable pin.

logical_pins.name: ADV_B
logical_pins.description: BPI master flash mode address valid pin.

logical_pins.name: D[31:00]
logical_pins.description: Configuration data bus pins.

logical_pins.name: MOSI
logical_pins.description: SPI master flash mode master-out slave-in data pin.

logical_pins.name: FCS2_B
logical_pins.description: Secondary flash chip select pin for SPI mode.

logical_pins.name: DONE
logical_pins.description: Configuration status pin, indicates completion of the configuration process.

logical_pins.name: POR_OVERRIDE
logical_pins.description: Power-on reset override pin. Must be connected to either GND (default) or VCCINT.

logical_pins.name: CCLK
logical_pins.description: Configuration clock pin.

logical_pins.name: EMCCLK
logical_pins.description: External master configuration clock pin.

logical_pins.name: RXP/RXN
logical_pins.description: Transceiver receiver differential input pair. Absolute input voltage range: -0.500V to 1.200V.

logical_pins.name: TXP/TXN
logical_pins.description: Transceiver transmitter differential output pair. Absolute input voltage range: -0.500V to 1.200V.

logical_pins.name: VMGTREFCLK
logical_pins.description: Transceiver reference clock absolute input voltage. Range: -0.500V to 1.300V.

logical_pins.name: VREFP
logical_pins.description: System Monitor externally supplied reference voltage relative to GNDADC. Typical value: 1.250V (1.200V - 1.300V).
